name: conversion-cta-specialist
description: The Conversion CTA Specialist — analyzes a user's website for CTA copy, placement, and design, then generates optimized CTA strategies to increase conversions — with user confirmation and strategy selection pauses

config.title: Let's confirm what we found on your site
config.description: We've crawled your website and cataloged your CTAs. Please review and fill in anything we missed.

sections.title: Business & Site Understanding
sections.description: Here's what we know about your business and website:

fields.label: Is this understanding of your business accurate?
What would you change or add about your business?

sections.title: CTA Inventory
sections.description: Here are the CTAs we found across your site. This is critical — please correct anything that's wrong and add any we missed.

fields.label: Does this match what's on your site?
What CTAs did we miss, or what did we get wrong?
fields.placeholder: E.g., 'There's also a sticky banner at the top offering 10% off', 'The Buy Now button only shows on desktop', 'We recently changed the homepage CTA to Get Started'...

fields.label: What is the #1 action you want visitors to take on your site?
fields.placeholder: E.g., 'Buy a product', 'Book a consultation', 'Sign up for a free trial', 'Call us'...

fields.label: Do you already know of any CTA problems? (optional)
fields.placeholder: E.g., 'People say they can't find the buy button on mobile', 'Our bounce rate is high on the pricing page'...

config.prompt:
You are a conversion rate optimization specialist focused on CTAs. Based on the CTA audit, business context, and industry research below, generate exactly 3 CTA optimization strategies.

## Business Context
{{BUSINESS_CONTEXT}}

## Current CTA Inventory
{{CTA_INVENTORY}}

## User's Primary Conversion Goal
{{CONVERSION_GOAL}}

## Known Issues
{{KNOWN_ISSUES}}

## User Corrections
{{USER_CORRECTIONS}}

## Industry Research & Best Practices
{{INDUSTRY_RESEARCH}}

---

## Instructions

Generate 3 strategies that each take a different approach to improving CTA conversion. Strategies should be MECE — vary across these dimensions:

| Dimension | Options |
|---|---|
| **Focus** | Copy rewrite / Placement restructure / Design overhaul |
| **Scope** | Single high-impact page / Full-site systematic / Funnel-stage targeted |
| **Effort** | Quick wins (< 1 day) / Moderate (1-3 days) / Comprehensive (1-2 weeks) |

For each strategy provide:

### Strategy [A/B/C]: [Name]
**Focus:** [Copy / Placement / Design — or combination]
**Scope:** [Which pages/areas of the site]
**Effort Level:** [Quick wins / Moderate / Comprehensive]

**What changes:** 2-3 sentence description of the core change

**Specific changes:**
- Page: [page name] — Current: "[current CTA]" → Proposed: "[new CTA]" + [placement/design change]
- (list each concrete change)

**Why this works:** Cite specific evidence from the industry research or general CTA best practices

**Expected conversion lift:** X-Y% based on benchmarks for this type of change

**Pros:**
- ...

**Cons:**
- ...

**Implementation effort:** What a non-technical person would need to do (or ask their developer/designer to do)

---

After all 3 strategies, provide:

### Our Recommendation
Which strategy we recommend starting with and why. Factor in:
- Expected conversion impact
- Implementation effort (remember: assume non-technical user)
- Risk to existing conversion rate
- How quickly they'll see results
- Their stated conversion goal and known issues

config.title: Pick your CTA optimization path
config.description: We've developed 3 approaches to improve your conversion CTAs. Review each and pick the one you want to implement.

fields.label: Which strategy do you want to pursue?
Any constraints, preferences, or additional context?
fields.placeholder: E.g., 'We can't change the header — it's controlled by our theme', 'I want to focus on mobile first', 'We use Shopify and can only edit through the theme editor'...
